text.title: Accessibility Procedure
text.summary: 7-step procedure to apply Accessibility end-to-end against a single input bundle. Each step has explicit input/action/output; gates between steps surface human-review points before binding actions.

step.name: decide-target
step.action: Pick conformance target with one-paragraph rationale.

step.name: pick-tools
step.action: Choose axe + a screen-reader + a CI a11y job.

step.name: wire-ci
step.action: Add CI gate failing on critical/serious axe violations.

step.name: vendor-policy
step.action: Decide escalation / alternate / wrap for each vendor.

step.name: regression-policy
step.action: Add a11y regression-test requirement to PR template.
